name: Clone Container
description: Creates a new LXC container by cloning an existing one. Used for reconfigure and addon-reconfigure tasks where the OS image stays the same but configuration changes.

parameters.name: Source VM ID
parameters.description: Existing LXC container ID to clone. Must be a container created by oci-lxc-deployer.

parameters.name: Target VM ID
parameters.description: Optional: VM/CT ID for the new container. If empty, the next free ID will be used (respecting vm_id_start if set).

parameters.name: VM ID Start
parameters.description: Optional: Start index for auto-assigned VM IDs. The next free ID starting from this value will be used.
